seoTitle: Square Mile vs St Clair — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Square Mile and St Clair. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Square Mile vs St Clair: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Square Mile and St Clair.
heading: Square Mile vs St Clair — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Square Mile, South Australia and St Clair, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Clair has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Square Mile (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Square Mile or St Clair safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Square Mile has a flood risk score of 53/100, while St Clair scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Square Mile scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. St Clair scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Square Mile or St Clair?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Clair has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
